query:
INSERT INTO notification_preferences (
                user_id, channels, per_type, quiet_hours, updated_at
            )
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
            ON CONFLICT (user_id)
            DO UPDATE SET
                channels = EXCLUDED.channels,
                per_type = EXCLUDED.per_type,
                quiet_hours = EXCLUDED.quiet_hours,
                updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
